docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY VALDIVIEZO LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
INVALID POS AS TO ALVAREZ PEDRO NO MANNER OF SERVI CE CHECKED OR WHERE POS WAS DELIVERED.
